objects.label: picture frame
objects.long_form_open_description: Rectangular dark-brown wooden picture frame with a gilded inner trim and varnished finish, enclosing a glass-covered seascape print of sailboats; the frame shows minor scuffs and edge wear and there is slight reflection on the glass — photographed at approximately 1.5 m from the camera.
scene_attributes: framed maritime painting centered on wall
two white paneled doors (one left, one in background right)
hardwood floor visible in adjoining space
